objective: OpenCodex dev→main merge + npm publish release verification (PABCD 1 cycle). WP1: merge dev into main, build, test, release via scripts/release.ts, verify npm dist-tags.

workPhases.title: Merge dev to main, build, test, release, verify npm

tasks.title: git checkout main && git merge dev
npm view dist-tags confirms new version

criteria.scenario: dev merges into main without conflicts
criteria.expectedEvidence: git merge output showing no conflicts
criteria.capturedEvidence: git merge dev --no-edit: 'Merge made by the ort strategy.' 45 files changed, 3049 insertions(+), 69 deletions(-). No conflicts. Commit 9b2e9a24.
release.ts preflight: 'bun x tsc --noEmit' exit 0. Ran twice (first release attempt + final release), both passed.

criteria.expectedEvidence: test runner exit code 0 with summary
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test --isolate tests: 3289 pass, 0 fail, 14220 expect() calls, 280 files, 76.64s. Privacy scan passed. CI green: https://github.com/lidge-jun/opencodex/actions/runs/29810793683

criteria.scenario: npm publish succeeds with new version
criteria.expectedEvidence: npm view @bitkyc08/opencodex dist-tags shows latest = new version
criteria.capturedEvidence: npm view @bitkyc08/opencodex dist-tags --json: {"latest":"2.7.29","preview":"2.7.28-preview.20260720"}. Release workflow: https://github.com/lidge-jun/opencodex/actions/runs/29811065650 all steps green.
